title: Creative Selection Strategy
description: How a creative agent samples which catalog items / signal conditions to produce creatives for when max_creatives is below the eligible count (#5262). Selection ordering surfaces on the existing rank/recommended fields of build_creative's creatives[].variants[].

enumDescriptions.audience_relevance: Rank by relevance to the buyer's audience signal(s) — drawn from the SAME signal_ref pointers in signal_conditions / package targeting, not a parallel signals[] array.
enumDescriptions.proximity: Rank by proximity to a location input (geo input shape TBD — reuse an existing geo/targeting shape; do not invent a parallel one).
enumDescriptions.inventory_priority: Rank by seller-side catalog metadata (margin, overstock, promotional priority). No buyer input.
enumDescriptions.random: Status-quo fallback: agent samples without a ranking preference. Default when selection_strategy is omitted.
